title: Horror Mods x 2011165 Optimized
description: A 1.19.2 Forge Version of 2011165 Optimized, with entities of terror mixed in. ESSENTIAL MOD INCLUDED TO PLAY WITH FRIENDS.
body:
VIDEO WITH MODPACK 1.0: https://youtu.be/5-zml92uq5w?si=cKIISijY-ZqIARQH](https://youtu.be/5-zml92uq5w?si=cKIISijY-ZqIARQH

ESSENTIAL MOD INCLUDED TO PLAY WITH FRIENDS.

This modpack is a Forge 1.19.2 version of Skippy Optimized. There is many new blocks, structures and biomes thanks to the Biomes O' Plenty and Dungeons and Taverns mod. But do not think you are safe in this world. The overworld and caves are littered with Midnight Lurkers and you can catch a few structures and glimpses to the infamous Herobrine. Tales tell of a Man From the Fog and the One Who Watches. Cave Dwellers are scattered throughout the night and in the dark and dense caves. Things are even more stressful with the Tense Ambience mod. In this bizarre place you can see glimpses of past explorers and friends. Survival is the most important thing, but make sure not to do too many bad things, or the god will make sure you don't see another day. Many ways your journey can lay out, what about yours?
